ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation for the event (e.g., JNRMS, CDTMS) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Junior Regional, Cadet Divisional) */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division where the event takes place */,
  "primary_club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary club associated with the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_format" TEXT /* Format of the event (e.g., individual, team) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., upcoming, in progress, completed) */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed for the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for event registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_primary_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "unique_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier assigned to the participant (e.g., 100241626) */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the participant is affiliated with */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the participant */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status of the participant (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "fencing_rating" TEXT /* Fencing rating or classification of the participant */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach associated with the participant */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the club */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the club */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the club */,
  "club_type" TEXT /* Type of club (e.g., school, community, private) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliations with national or international fencing organizations */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the club */,
  "club_status" TEXT /* Status of the club (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the division is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "division_type" TEXT /* Type of division (e.g., regional, national) */,
  "governing_body" TEXT /* Governing body overseeing the division */,
  "division_status" TEXT /* Status of the division (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "event_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event participation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of event registration */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Status of participation (e.g., registered, attended, cancelled) */,
  "participation_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the event (e.g., competitor, coach, staff) */,
  "equipment_rental" TEXT /* Equipment rental information for the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the coach */,
  "coaching_qualifications" TEXT /* Coaching qualifications and certifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., tournament director, referee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
